form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation second of 8 at Woodbine Inner September 14 over 1609m, 1.5 len behind Lennox The Grey with 55kg at $5.80. On debut fifth of 8 at Woodbine All Weather July 13 over 1207m, 14 len behind Two Out Hero with 55kg at $3.35. Among the main contenders.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 34-day let-up. Most recently 6th of 11 at Tampa Bay Downs Turf on March 6 over 1609m, 12 len behind Instability carrying 54kg at $12.50. The start before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at Tampa Bay Downs Turf on February 15 over 1710m, 4 len behind Third Coast carrying 54kg at $12.70. Cannot be ruled out despite a lacklustre effort last time.

form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut eased back early on 3rd in a small field at Gulfstream Park on January 3 over 1207m, 7 len behind Sweeping Shadow with 55.5kg at $3.20. Went for a spell before returning 6th of 8 at Gulfstream Park on March 20 over 1710m, 14 len behind Make My Day carrying 54.5kg at $10.50. Leading chance with plenty of upside.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, didn't finish the race at this track January 29 over 1710m. Last start settled back and ran on when 6th of 12 at this track on February 27 over 1609m, 6 len behind The Town with 55.5kg at $19.70. Not keen on his chances.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes off a 41 day let-up. Most recently made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 12 at this track on February 27 over 1609m, 0.8 len behind The Town carrying 55.5kg at $6.80. The race before that 4th of 10 at this track on January 2 over 1609m, 2.75 len behind Immortalised carrying 55.5kg at $5.70. Working up to a win. Worth following.
